content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across multiple sectors (auto, defense, capital goods, IT-Coforge, specialty chems, FMCG, financials). All 11 held positions are showing gains today on a strong tape. Global cues supportive (US markets +1.5-2%). Priority is to manage existing winners — trail SLs to lock in gains, not add new exposure when book is already at full deployment intent.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. SL at 1035 is already above entry locking ~5% gain (1.0% trail gap below CMP — at floor). Holding existing levels; price near R1 1069. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 121 = -3.3% from entry, defensive position. Gold thesis intact (Fed transition May, central bank buying). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Q4 beat (revenue +26.5%), making fresh 52W highs. Trail SL from 1725 to 1735 (locks +2.1%, sits 1.3% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline). Target 1820 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Trail SL from 4540 to 4570 (near breakeven, 1.3% below CMP). CAUTION: Q4 board meeting May 14 = binary event in ~5 sessions; will reassess as we get within 3-session window. Defense theme intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Q4 results (PAT +124% YoY, EBITDA margin +875bps) already out — no binary overhang. SL 6960 already above entry, sits 1.3% below CMP, locks +0.9%. Hold target 7400 (nearing 52W high 7200)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. SL 836 already at entry-1, trail gap 1.1% below CMP — at floor. Q4 results pending = binary risk. Will tighten / consider event-trim if within 3 sessions. No-op MODIFY: switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = flat. Fresh ATH today (372.50). Q4 PAT +31% just delivered, no binary overhang. SL 365 (~1% below CMP). Hold to target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Q4 beat already announced (PAT +14-18%, India vol +9%). SL 815 sits 0.9% below CMP — already near trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY: switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Q4 just out, gap-up +11%. SL 1253 = 2.0% below CMP, healthy trail gap. Hold to target 1330. Will trail higher if hits +3-4%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. Q4 results out Apr 28 — no binary overhang. Trail SL 2990→3000 (1.1% below CMP). Defense capex theme, +9.2% today on volume."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = flat. Q4 ATH revenue, +10.5% gap-up today. SL 800 = 0.9% below CMP — at trail-gap floor, no tightening room. Hold to target 855."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +5% above entry; sits 2% below CMP, within trail discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold position, slight unrealized loss within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to lock partial gains as stock makes 52W high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to near-breakeven; reassess at <3 sessions to May 14 board meeting."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; Q4 binary cleared."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor; cannot tighten further without forcing exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor; ATH momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "SL near trail-gap floor; Q4 cleared."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1253.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail gap healthy at 2%; let momentum play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to round number; 1.1% gap below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor; Q4 cleared."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups noted but NOT acting: BAJAJ-AUTO (Q4 +34%, buyback at 12000 floor — but minimum lot ~10K capital, near 52W high already), M&M (Q4 +48% PAT, +5.7% today), POLYCAB, SRF (+6.85%, MOFSL upgrade). Book is essentially fully deployed across 11 names; adding now would breach sector concentration (already 3 capital goods/defense names: HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH; 3 financials: PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS). Capital Goods cluster nearing limit. Will reassess after some positions hit targets or stops.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.72% — the prior damage was done by previous strategy iterations; current book is constructive with 11 positions all green or flat on a strong tape. CRITICAL: HFCL pending BUY order from earlier (1888min ago = stale, multi-day) needs cleanup but cannot CANCEL via this schema — flag for next pulse. PRIORITY DISCIPLINE: HAL has Q4 board May 14 (5 sessions out, just outside 3-session binary window), TITAGARH Q4 pending — both monitor closely; if catalysts move within 3 sessions, will trim to ≤5% or tighten SL aggressively. Sector exposure check: Capital Goods (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH) ≈ 22% of book — at cluster soft limit, no new defense/cap-goods adds. Financial Services (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) ≈ 18% — also at soft cap."
}
